name: ethernetPacket::RemoveVlan
title: ethernetPacket::RemoveVlan
description: Removes a VLAN tag from an Ethernet packet.
To remove a specific VLAN tag from a double-tagged packet form 2 can be used.

parameters.name: vlanIndex
parameters.description: Index of the VLAN tag for double-tagged VLANs. Index 0 is the inner VLAN, index 1 the outer VLAN.Range 0..2
